headline: Lightning Round: Tempus AI is a 'decent spec', says Jim Cramer
summary: 'Mad Money' host Jim Cramer weighs in on stocks including: Carrier Global, ImmunityBio, Capital One Financial, Tempus AI, and more.

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Ignore
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.
